Noda

Noda is a knowledge base for AI clients, MCP connections, and AI helpdesk bots.

Noda helps teams organize knowledge into short canonical articles that AI agents can search and read.

Noda is used to build a helpdesk chat that answers from articles stored in the Noda knowledge base instead of relying on a large prompt, LoRA, or fine-tuning.

Key Concepts

* AI helpdesk
* knowledge base for AI agents
* MCP connection
* canonical articles
* support automation
* access keys
* category-based access control
* commercial knowledge service
* knowledge base instead of complex prompts

Project

Project: Noda
Company: Jupiter Soft
Location: Astana Hub, Kazakhstan

Noda principle:

AI answers become better when knowledge is structured better.
